F

filePath - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureConfiguration
filePath indicates the directory where will be stored the frames saved by the Scanner.
findPropertybyId(ArrayList<Property>, int) - 类 中的静态方法com.android.device.configuration.Property
Finds the corresponding Property matching the passed ID, in a list of Properties.
format - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureConfiguration
format selects the format used for storing the frames captured by the Scanner.
format - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Provides configuration for formatting functionalities.
Formatting - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Formatting is the class that configures the properties related to barcode text formatting.
Formatting(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Formatting
This is the constructor of Formatting.
FRAME_CAPTURE_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
FRAME_CAPTURE_FILE_PATH - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
FRAME_CAPTURE_FORMAT - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
FRAME_CAPTURE_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
FRAME_CAPTURE_STORAGE_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
FrameCaptureConfiguration - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
FrameCaptureConfiguration is the class that configures the scanner to capture store and provide frames.
FrameCaptureConfiguration(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureConfiguration
This is the constructor of FrameCaptureConfiguration.
FrameCaptureFormat - com.android.decode.configuration中的枚举
The FrameCaptureFileType is an enumeration defining the file type for the frames captured by the Scanner.
FrameCaptureListener - com.android.decode中的接口
This interface is used by the application to listen to the decoder's frame capture event.
FrameCaptureMode - com.android.decode.configuration中的枚举
The FrameCaptureMode is an enumeration defining the operating frame capture mode.
FrameSaveListener - com.android.decode中的接口
This interface is used by the application to listen to the decoder's frame save event.
fromInt(int) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.BooleanProperty
 
fromInt(int) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.CharacterProperty
 
fromInt(int) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.EnumProperty
 
fromInt(int) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.NumericProperty
 
fromInt(int) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.Property
 
fromInt(int) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.TextProperty
 
fromOrdinal(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.BarcodeID
From the ordered enum to BarcodeID.
fromOrdinal(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.configuration.BeamMode
 
fromOrdinal(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.configuration.CharacterSetMode
 
fromOrdinal(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.configuration.Code128Aggressiveness
Retrieves the corresponding Code128Aggressiveness value, from a valid integer.
fromOrdinal(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.configuration.DatamatrixOpMode
 
fromOrdinal(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureFormat

fromOrdinal(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.Symbology
From the ordered enum to Symobology.
fromPropertyID(int) - 枚举 中的静态方法com.android.decode.Symbology
From an integer value representing an enable PropertyID, retrieves the corresponding Symbology.
